control.description-key: Native-parity single-record lookup, the kit SmartNativeLookup bound to a lookup column. See docs/adding-a-pcf.md.

property.name: value
property.description-key: The bound lookup column rendered with the kit native-parity lookup

property.name: attribute
property.description-key: Logical name of the bound lookup column (e.g. preferredsystemuserid), used to resolve targets and the lookup view from metadata

property.name: viewName
property.description-key: Override the lookup view that drives the flyout columns and search; default is the entity lookup view

property.name: showIcons
property.description-key: Resolve and show the target entity icon in the flyout rows
